name: Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the pork chops generously with seasoned salt and black pepper.
2. Brown the pork chops in a skillet on both sides.
3. Place the pork chops in a casserole dish and top each with a large onion slice.
4. Pour the tomatoes and chilies over the pork chops.
5. Sprinkle the cumin evenly over the entire casserole.
6. Cover with foil and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
7. Uncover and bake an additional 15 minutes longer.
8. For almond rice, sauté sliced almonds in butter or margarine until light brown.
9. Add rice, salt, and water to the sautéed almonds; bring to a boil.
10. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes.
11. Serve the pork chops with almond rice.
This recipe was contributed by Harry Anderson of Mobile, Alabama to the book "Snake, Rattle, and ROTEL".
